quote: To live fully is to be always in no-man's-land, to experience each moment as completely new and fresh. – Pema Chodron
fact: The microwave was invented after a researcher walked by a radar tube and a chocolate bar melted in his pocket.
joke: Thanks for explaining the word "many" to me. It means a lot.
